mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month momentum in RSAFS signals stronger household demand and near-term revenue growth for index constituents, so higher RSAFS momentum predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:SPX 20-day forward returns were positive on 65.5% of sessions in the 2005-2024 target panel
failure_condition: Reject if the top tercile of real-time RSAFS 3-month momentum does not outperform the bottom tercile in 20-day forward returns by at least 25 bps on average in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS crosses into restrictive territory while CPIAUCSL inflation remains elevated, discount-rate pressure dominates earnings growth and produces negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above 4.5% and CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation is above 4%
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows FEDFUNDS at 4.09 for 2025-10
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle with above-target inflation
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if the triggered mean return is not below the unconditional mean at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in UNRATE signals weakening labor income and recession risk, causing investors to mark down expected earnings and generating negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows UNRATE at 4.3 for 2025-08
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward S&P 500 returns after the UNRATE trigger are positive in at least 65% of cases and the average triggered return is not below zero.

mechanism_narrative: Rising 3-month momentum in INDPRO signals improving production, operating leverage, and cyclical earnings breadth, so stronger INDPRO momentum predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot includes INDPRO vintage value 103.9203 for 2025-08
failure_condition: Reject if the walk-forward rank correlation between INDPRO 3-month momentum and 60-day S&P 500 forward returns is below 0.03 over two consecutive 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A large downside break in HOUST signals housing-led demand weakness, tighter credit transmission, and future pressure on durable-goods earnings, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its 12-month moving average by more than 10%
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot includes HOUST vintage value 1307.0 for 2025-08
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have a nonnegative average 60-day S&P 500 forward return and no drawdown-frequency increase versus non-triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS accelerates while FEDFUNDS falls, demand growth and monetary support reinforce each other, improving earnings expectations and valuation multiples and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month growth crosses above its 6-month average while FEDFUNDS is lower than 3 months earlier
failure_condition: Reject if the joint signal does not outperform either single-series signal and does not produce positive 20-day returns in at least 60% of triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: When PAYEMS growth decelerates while UNRATE rises, the labor market shifts from expansion to contraction, lowering household income and earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month job growth falls below its 12-month average and UNRATE rises by more than 0.2 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot includes PAYEMS vintage value 159540 for 2025-08
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce average 60-day S&P 500 returns above the unconditional average or if the interaction term is not negative in walk-forward logistic tests.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation decelerates while FEDFUNDS is stable or falling, expected policy restraint declines faster than earnings expectations, creating a valuation relief channel and positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation crosses below 12-month inflation while FEDFUNDS is not higher than 3 months earlier
regime_hint: disinflation phase after restrictive monetary policy
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations fail to deliver positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases or if average triggered returns are below the unconditional 5-day mean.
